app.title: Gaming App
app.subtitle: Choose a game
theme.label: Theme
network.offlineBanner: Offline — scores will sync when you reconnect
newGame.confirm.title: Start new game?
newGame.confirm.body: Your current game will be lost. Score and round will reset.
clearLogs.label: Clear local logs
clearLogs.description: Delete all queued events and bug logs that haven't synced yet.
clearLogs.confirm.title: Clear local logs?
clearLogs.confirm.body: This will remove every queued game event and bug log stored on this device. Synced data stays on the server. This cannot be undone.
capacityWarning.title: Queued game data is filling up
capacityWarning.body: Clear it in Settings to keep the app running smoothly.
deck.label: Card deck
overflow.menu.label: More options
overflow.abandon.title: Abandon current game?
overflow.abandon.body: Starting a new game will discard your progress in this round. Your lifetime stats won't be affected.
